name: ERSTER
description: ERSTER — Founding Validator. EU tokenization platform operated by BCP Partners GmbH, Berlin. Score-based consensus node. Enforces Verun score tiers and operation gates.

name: tokenforge
description: Founding Validator. eWpG-compliant German Security Token platform (TokenSuite). Chain API gate enforces Score 300+ read, 500+ transfer/mint, 600+ order.

name: Test Validator
description: Raw test validator. Always returns a score-based vote. For development and 3rd-slot consensus only — not for production.
